title: Blue Cherry Grove
description: Recolors the entire Cherry Grove biome with blue textures, wood, and particles.
body:
## Description
  Reimagine the Cherry Grove with a stunning blue aesthetic.
  
  Blue Cherry Grove completely transforms the biome’s visual palette, recoloring 
  its environment, wood, foliage, and particles to create a fresh and 
  immersive new atmosphere.
  
  Perfect for players looking to give their world a magical, unique biome makeover.
  
  Experience Cherry Grove like never before.

## How It Works
  This resource pack replaces the default Cherry Grove biome colors and related textures 
  with a custom blue variant.

## Installation / Usage
  1. Download and install the resource pack
  2. Enable it in Minecraft’s Resource Packs menu
  3. Enter a Cherry Grove biome
  4. Enjoy the new blue environment

## Included Changes
  - Blue Cherry Grove foliage
  - Recolored cherry wood textures
  - Modified biome ambient particles
  - Full biome atmosphere overhaul
  - Consistent blue visual theme

## In-Game Preview
![In game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33d184f06a0ea433de90bc5332e2bc8fd4e2609d.png)
